name: Butter Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, lemon juice, and currants until well combined.
3. Continue beating until the mixture is bubbly.
4. Roll out the basic pie dough and cut rounds to fit 2-1/2-inch muffin tins.
5. Place the pastry rounds into the prepared muffin tins.
6. Fill each tart shell about 2/3 full with currant mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
